title: Joined BS-MS Program at IISER
description: Began undergraduate studies in Biological Sciences. Exposed to genetics, biochemistry, and physical chemistry.

title: Began Self-Taught Coding Journey
description: Started learning Python and Git to parse large datasets from university laboratory sessions.

title: First Lab Fellowship
description: Selected for a Summer Research Fellowship modeling freshwater chemistry and ecosystem stress levels.

title: Founded Ascent Run Club
description: Began running weekly group sessions with fellow students. Grew from 4 members to over 100 within a year.

title: Completed First Half Marathon
description: Finished the Campus Classic Half Marathon in 1h 28m, cementing endurance running as a core routine.

title: Joined IISER Neurobiology Lab
description: Undergraduate Research Assistant studying zebrafish brain connectivity and macrophage activity.

title: Building Open Source Tools
description: Developing spatial transcriptomics visualization dashboards and cell-tracking simulation scripts.

title: Future Horizons
description: Aiming to apply for Computational Biology and Neuroscience PhD programs to research network dynamics.
